features.title: Workbench skeleton + Python/Node 工具链 bootstrap
features.acceptance: 建立 workbench/{backend,frontend} 目录骨架。Backend：pyproject.toml (FastAPI + Pydantic v2 + Uvicorn + pytest + httpx + ruff + mypy)；workbench_api/app.py 暴露 /health endpoint 返回 {status:ok, version:<git_sha>}；workbench_api/settings.py 含 env var 显式 allowlist（B020 为空）；ruff + mypy 全清；pytest 通过。Frontend：Next.js 14 + React 18 + TypeScript strict + Tailwind 3 + ESLint + Prettier + Vitest + Playwright config (chromium only)。Placeholder Home page 渲染 'Workbench scaffold OK' 卡 + Footer 含 canonical disclaimer (DISCLAIMER_TEXT 常量来自 lib/disclaimer.ts)。scripts/start_workbench.sh 并发启 backend (uvicorn 127.0.0.1:8723) + frontend (next dev 3000)。workbench/README.md 含 prerequisites + 一键 boot + dev/test/lint commands + 10 分钟 zero-to-running 承诺。验收：clean clone + boot ≤ 10 min；curl /health 返回正确 JSON；http://localhost:3000 显示 placeholder + disclaimer；pytest workbench/backend/tests/ + ruff workbench/backend + mypy workbench/backend 全清；npm test/lint/typecheck/playwright 全清；trade/ 既有 592+ 测试无回归。**禁止引入：** broker SDK / paper API / live URL / auth / DB / Docker / nginx / cloud（这些是 B021）；shadcn 模板 / 金融配色 / Inter / JetBrains Mono / AG Grid / charts（这些是 B022）。

features.title: CI workflows (workbench-backend + workbench-frontend)
features.acceptance: 新增 .github/workflows/workbench-backend.yml + workbench-frontend.yml。两个 workflow 都跑 PR + push to main，按 path filter 触发（workbench/backend/** 与 workbench/frontend/**）。workbench-backend：Python 3.11 setup + pip cache + install workbench/backend[dev] + pytest + ruff + mypy + 安全 guard 测试单独 step（让失败 surface 标识违反的边界）。workbench-frontend：Node 20 setup + npm cache + Playwright browser cache (chromium only) + npm ci + npm run lint/typecheck/test + start-server-and-test 并发跑 backend → Playwright E2E smoke；失败时上传 Playwright HTML report + screenshots/video artifact。验收：(1) 两 workflow 在 F002 commit 全绿；(2) 二跑命中 cache (workflow log 验证)；(3) 故意 throwaway commit 让 backend test 红 → workbench-backend fail (branch protection 下阻 merge)；(4) 故意 throwaway commit 让 frontend test 红 → workbench-frontend fail with artifact uploaded；(5) python-ci.yml 仍绿；(6) 典型 PR CI wall time ≤ 10 min（backend + frontend 并行 job）。

features.title: 测试策略文档 + 安全 guard 脚手架
features.acceptance: (1) 新增 docs/dev/workbench-testing-strategy.md ≤ 200 行，覆盖 L1 unit (pytest/Vitest 默认 CI 跑 / 无 network)、L2 integration (httpx TestClient 后端 / Vitest mocked API 前端 / Playwright against running backend)、L3 E2E (Playwright + start-server-and-test pattern, chromium only B020)、安全 regression 测试（独立目录、CI 跑、视为边界违反 guard）、fixture/mock-first 默认 + framework v0.9.21 #1 (synthetic-vs-real reversal) 引用。(2) 实现 5 个安全 regression 测试：tests/safety/test_no_broker_sdk_imports.py (backend 全树 grep ib_insync/alpaca/alpaca_trade_api/futu/tiger/tradier/polygon/oandapy/tradeapi)、tests/safety/test_no_paper_or_live_urls.py (backend 全树 grep paper-api.alpaca.markets/api.alpaca.markets/paper.gateway.ibkr.com/gw.gateway.ibkr.com/api.futu.com/api.tigerbrokers.com)、tests/safety/test_settings_env_allowlist.py (workbench_api.settings 仅读 allowlist 内的 env，B020 allowlist 为空)、tests/safety/no-broker-sdk-imports.spec.ts (frontend 全树 + package.json grep @alpaca-/ib-insync/futu-api/tiger-securities)、tests/safety/disclaimer-present.spec.ts (Playwright 加载每个 navigable route，B020 = 仅 / ，断言 DISCLAIMER_TEXT 可见)。(3) 5 个测试在 F003 commit 全绿；每个测试在故意 throwaway 违反 commit 上必须红（Codex F005 trip-test 验证）；测试名自解释（如 test_alpaca_not_imported_anywhere）。两个测试在 workbench-backend yml 跑（3 个 backend），两个在 workbench-frontend yml 跑（2 个 frontend），按 yml step 分清。

features.title: OpenAPI ↔ TypeScript types pipeline + CI drift check
features.acceptance: 新增 workbench/frontend/scripts/generate-types.sh 脚本：(1) 后台启 backend uvicorn；(2) curl /openapi.json 到临时文件；(3) npx openapi-typescript /tmp/openapi.json -o workbench/frontend/src/types/api.ts；(4) 杀 backend；(5) git diff --exit-code workbench/frontend/src/types/api.ts（CI 用此 detect drift）。在 workbench-frontend.yml 加 CI step：跑 generate-types.sh + git diff，drift 时 fail。Placeholder Home page (F001) 必须 consume 生成的 /health type 验证 pipeline 全链路连通（TypeScript 编译器自动验证类型被消费）。验收：(1) generate-types.sh idempotent (跑两次产物字节相同)；(2) F004 commit CI drift check 通过；(3) 故意 throwaway commit 改 backend /health 响应 schema 但不重新跑 generate-types → CI fail（Codex F005 trip-test 验证）；(4) Home page 渲染来自 /health 的 typed data。

features.title: Dev 文档 + branch protection 指引 + Codex L1 验收 + signoff
features.acceptance: (1) 写 docs/dev/branch-protection-guidance.md：列出用户在 GitHub Settings → Branches 应配的规则——main require status check (python-ci/workbench-backend/workbench-frontend) + require linear history + force push 禁 + 可选 1 review。(2) 写 docs/dev/workbench-architecture.md skeleton：项目结构 + 后端 app factory + settings allowlist + 安全 guard + 前端 App Router placeholder + Footer + types/api.ts pipeline + CI workflows + 与 ADR + B021/B022/B023 spec 的 cross-link（B021/B022 spec 可能未存在，前向引用 OK）+ 边界重申。(3) Codex 8 项验收 checklist 全过：① clean clone 起 ≤ 10 min；② pytest/ruff/mypy backend 全清；③ npm test/lint/typecheck frontend 全清；④ npx playwright test 全清 + HTML report 渲染；⑤ CI 两 workflow 在验收 commit 全绿；⑥ Trip-test 5 个安全 regression（throwaway commit 故意违反，每条都触发对应测试 fail，revert）；⑦ Trip-test OpenAPI drift（throwaway commit 改 backend /health schema 不 regenerate types，CI fail，revert）；⑧ trade/ 既有测试无回归全绿。(4) 写 docs/test-reports/B020-dev-infrastructure-signoff-2026-MM-DD.md 用 framework/templates/signoff-report.md 模板：Scope + 8 项验收命令 & 结果 + 5 trip-test 结果 + Disclaimer。(5) 更新 progress.json：status → done / docs.signoff 设值 / evaluator_feedback 总结 8 项验收概要。
